title: MAINTAINER: BotEvent field inconsistency -- message_id always empty, no doc why
description: In dispatcher.rs line 52, when dispatching a DELIVER or WHISPER_DELIVER, we create BotEvent::MessageReceived with message_id = String::new() (empty). The comment says 'message_id not carried in DeliverParams; leave empty' but this is misleading: message_id IS in Envelope (the UUID), but the notification doesn't include it. A future maintainer (or API consumer) reading the BotEvent schema will ask 'why is message_id always empty?' and won't find an invariant doc. In Phase 2, when acking is added, this will cause confusion. Fix: doc comment on BotEvent::MessageReceived explaining why message_id is reserved-but-empty in Phase 4f.
